title: arum elongatum f. engleri
intro: Arum elongatum f. engleri, also known as Engler's arum, is a species of flowering plant in the arum family. The plant is recognized for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Arum elongatum f. engleri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. Arum elongatum f. engleri is traditionally prepared as a tincture or infusion, with the plant's roots and rhizomes often being used in herbal medicine.
